payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Front-facing, single-seat dark brown leather couch (recliner style) with glossy, creased and slightly worn upholstery, thick padded back and arm cushions, visible horizontal stitching and panel seams; lower footrest seam visible; right side of the couch is edge-cropped in the image; estimated distance from camera ~1.2 m.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather couch, front","long_description":"Front-facing, single-seat dark brown leather couch (recliner style) with glossy, creased and slightly worn upholstery, thick padded back and arm cushions, visible horizontal stitching and panel seams; lower footrest seam visible; right side of the couch is edge-cropped in the image; estimated distance from camera ~1.2 m.","attributes":["dark brown color","glossy leather material","plush padded cushions","visible creases/wear","horizontal stitching and panel seams","recliner-style lower seam","front-facing","right edge cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
